a is an architecture for visualizing and interacting with dynamic information spaces. In Diva, visualizations are built by hooking together software components which generate, supply, filter, and display information. The current release focuses on Di

lay information. The current release focuses on Diva's canvas and graph visualization infrastructure. Diva is primarily being developed by researchers in the Ptolemy and Mescal research groups to handle their visualization needs for complex systems d
